info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Cloud Control REST API
info.description:
REST API for Oracle Enterprise Manager Cloud Control providing programmatic access to monitoring, configuration, and administration capabilities. This specification covers core resources including targets, metrics, incidents, and blackouts for managing Oracle IT infrastructure and applications.

Contact Support:
 Name: Oracle Support
 Email: support@oracle.com

item.name: targets
{targetId}
properties
Oracle Enterprise Manager Get Target Properties

request.description: Returns the configuration and monitoring properties of a specific target, including instance properties, dynamic properties, and any custom properties defined for the target type.

response.name: Target properties.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

response.name: Authentication failed. Provide valid Enterprise Manager credentials.

request.description: Removes a monitored target from Enterprise Manager. This stops all monitoring, removes collected data associations, and deletes the target configuration.

item.name: incidents
{incidentId}
actions
clear
Oracle Enterprise Manager Clear an Incident

request.description: Clears an incident, indicating that the issue has been resolved. The incident status is set to CLOSED.

response.name: Incident cleared successfully.

item.name: suppress
Oracle Enterprise Manager Suppress an Incident

request.description: Suppresses an incident so it does not appear in active incident views or trigger notifications. Useful for known issues under investigation.

response.name: Incident suppressed successfully.

item.name: blackouts
{blackoutId}
actions
stop
Oracle Enterprise Manager Stop a Blackout

request.description: Stops an active blackout before its scheduled end time. Monitoring and alerting resume immediately for all affected targets.

response.name: Blackout stopped successfully.
